title: Natsu to Hako
synopsis: Sachi grew up without parents and came to the village for her aunt's funeral. Getting lost, she asked a passing guy to help her make a phone call from a phone booth. The boy introduced himself as Yoshi. It turned out that he is a distant relative of the girl. Suddenly, the door of the booth jammed, and the couple found themselves locked. They made an attempt to get out, which eventually led to the rapprochement of distant relatives.
